// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageIndexSetPrice references /set-price/
func POSTPageIndexSetPrice(query QueryPOSTPageIndexSetPrice) string {
	var (
		priceStr string
	)

	if query.Price != 0 {
		priceStr = strconv.FormatFloat(query.Price, 'f', -1, 64)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Price != 0

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/set-price/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Price != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("price=") + len(priceStr)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/set-price/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Price != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("price=")
		b.WriteString(priceStr)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPageIndexSetPrice struct {
	Price float64 `query:"price"`
}
